title: Solar Crest
description: The Solar Crest is an item in Dota 2 that provides multiple beneficial attributes to the player. It is a shop item that can be crafted from various other items available in the game's market.
usage: Players often build the Solar Crest as part of their core build to improve their survivability and effectiveness on the battlefield. The item provides health regeneration, mana regeneration, armor, and movement speed bonuses, making it a versatile addition to any hero's kit.
